state.output:
<path>/Users/hobo/Projects/AgentLog/skills/openclaw-agentlog/src/index.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: /**
2:  * OpenClaw Agent Log Skill - Trace/Span Based Version
3:  *
4:  * 合并了:
5:  * - agentlog-auto: 自动存证 Hooks
6:  * - openclaw-agent: Trace Handoff 功能
7:  *
8:  * 使用 trace/span API 而非 sessions API：
9:  * - POST /api/traces - 创建 trace
10:  * - MCP log_turn - 创建 span
11:  * - PATCH /api/traces/:id - 更新 trace 状态
12:  *
13:  * 提供给 OpenClaw Agent 使用。
14:  */
15: 
16: import { randomUUID } from "crypto";
17: import fs from "node:fs";
18: import path from "node:path";
19: import { nanoid } from "nanoid";
20: import type { PendingTraceEntry, ActiveSessionEntry, SessionsJson } from "@agentlog/shared";
21: 
22: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
23: // Backend Configuration
24: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
25: 
26: const BACKEND_URL = process.env.AGENTLOG_BACKEND_URL ?? "http://localhost:7892";
27: const MCP_URL = process.env.AGENTLOG_MCP_URL ?? "http://localhost:7892";
28: 
29: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
30: // Trace/Span Types
31: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
32: 
33: interface Trace {
34:   id: string;
35:   parentTraceId: string | null;
36:   taskGoal: string;
37:   status: "running" | "pending_handoff" | "in_progress" | "completed" | "failed" | "paused";
38:   workspacePath: string | null;
39:   affectedFiles: string[];
40:   createdAt: string;
41:   updatedAt: string;
42:   hasCommit: boolean;
43: }
44: 
45: interface TraceHandoffResult {
46:   success: boolean;
47:   traceId?: string;
48:   sessionId?: string;
49:   error?: string;
50: }
51: 
52: interface TraceSearchResult {
53:   traceId: string;
54:   taskGoal: string;
55:   targetAgent: string;
56:   createdAt: string;
57:   score?: number;
58: }
59: 
60: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
61: // Agent Source Detection
62: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
63: 
64: function detectAgentSource(): string {
65:   // 从 workspace 路径推断 agent 类型
66:   // 路径格式: /home/hobo/.openclaw/agents/<agent-name>/workspace
67:   const workspacePath = process.cwd();
68:   const match = workspacePath.match(/\/agents\/([^\/]+)\/workspace/);
69:   if (match) {
70:     return `openclaw:${match[1]}`;
71:   }
72: 
73:   // Fallback: 环境变量
74:   const agentId = process.env.AGENTLOG_AGENT_ID || process.env.AGENT || "";
75:   if (agentId) {
76:     return `openclaw:${agentId}`;
77:   }
78: 
79:   return "unknown";
80: }
81: 
82: function detectAgentType(): string {
83:   const workspacePath = process.cwd();
84:   const match = workspacePath.match(/\/agents\/([^\/]+)\/workspace/);
85:   if (match) {
86:     return match[1];
87:   }
88:   return process.env.AGENTLOG_AGENT_ID || "unknown";
89: }
90: 
91: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
92: // Auto-Logging Types
93: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
94: 
95: interface AgentLogConfig {
96:   mcpUrl: string;
97:   autoBindCommit: boolean;
98:   reasoningCapture: boolean;
99:   toolCallCapture: boolean;
100:   sessionTimeout: number;
101: }
102: 
103: interface SessionState {
104:   traceId: string;
105:   sessionId: string;
106:   startedAt: string;
107:   reasoning: string[];
108:   toolCalls: ToolCall[];
109:   responses: Response[];
110:   model: string;
111:   agentSource: string;
112:   workspacePath: string;
113:   taskGoal: string;
114: }
115: 
116: interface ToolCall {
117:   name: string;
118:   input: Record<string, unknown>;
119:   output?: string;
120:   durationMs: number;
121:   timestamp: string;
122: }
123: 
124: interface Response {
125:   content: string;
126:   timestamp: string;
127: }
128: 
129: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
130: // Auto-Logging State
131: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
132: 
133: let config: AgentLogConfig = {
134:   mcpUrl: MCP_URL,
135:   autoBindCommit: true,
136:   reasoningCapture: true,
137:   toolCallCapture: true,
138:   sessionTimeout: 600,
139: };
140: 
141: let currentSession: SessionState | null = null;
142: 
143: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
144: // sessions.json Operations (for Trace Handoff)
145: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
146: 
147: async function getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath: string): Promise<string> {
148:   const { execSync } = await import("child_process");
149:   const gitCommonDir = execSync(
150:     "git rev-parse --git-common-dir",
151:     { cwd: workspacePath, encoding: "utf-8" }
152:   ).trim();
153:   return path.join(gitCommonDir, "agentlog", "sessions.json");
154: }
155: 
156: function readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath: string): SessionsJson {
157:   if (!fs.existsSync(sessionsJsonPath)) {
158:     return { pending: {}, active: {} };
159:   }
160:   try {
161:     const content = fs.readFileSync(sessionsJsonPath, "utf-8");
162:     return JSON.parse(content) as SessionsJson;
163:   } catch {
164:     return { pending: {}, active: {} };
165:   }
166: }
167: 
168: function writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath: string, data: SessionsJson): void {
169:   const dir = path.dirname(sessionsJsonPath);
170:   if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {
171:     fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
172:   }
173:   const tmpPath = `${sessionsJsonPath}.tmp`;
174:   fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), "utf-8");
175:   fs.renameSync(tmpPath, sessionsJsonPath);
176: }
177: 
178: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
179: // Backend API Request
180: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
181: 
182: async function apiRequest<T>(
183:   method: string,
184:   endpoint: string,
185:   body?: unknown
186: ): Promise<T> {
187:   const url = `${BACKEND_URL}${endpoint}`;
188:   const options: RequestInit = {
189:     method,
190:     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
191:     ...(body ? { body: JSON.stringify(body) } : {}),
192:   };
193: 
194:   const response = await fetch(url, options);
195:   if (!response.ok) {
196:     throw new Error(`API 错误: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
197:   }
198: 
199:   return response.json() as Promise<T>;
200: }
201: 
202: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
203: // MCP Request (for log_turn/log_intent spans)
204: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
205: 
206: // Create span via REST API (replaces log_turn MCP call)
207: async function createSpan(traceId: string, span: {
208:   role: string;
209:   content: string;
210:   tool_name?: string;
211:   duration_ms?: number;
212:   timestamp?: string;
213: }): Promise<boolean> {
214:   try {
215:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
216:       "POST",
217:       "/api/spans",
218:       {
219:         traceId,
220:         actorType: span.role === "tool" ? "agent" : span.role,
221:         actorName: span.tool_name || "agent",
222:         payload: {
223:           event: span.role,
224:           content: span.content,
225:           toolName: span.tool_name,
226:           durationMs: span.duration_ms,
227:           timestamp: span.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
228:         },
229:       }
230:     );
231:     return result.success;
232:   } catch (error) {
233:     console.error("[openclaw-agentlog] Failed to create span:", error);
234:     return false;
235:   }
236: }
237: 
238: // Update trace status via REST API (replaces log_intent MCP call)
239: async function finalizeTrace(
240:   traceId: string,
241:   taskGoal: string,
242:   affectedFiles: string[],
243:   reasoning: string[]
244: ): Promise<boolean> {
245:   try {
246:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
247:       "PATCH",
248:       `/api/traces/${traceId}`,
249:       {
250:         status: "completed",
251:         taskGoal,
252:         affectedFiles,
253:         reasoningSummary: reasoning.join("\n\n"),
254:       }
255:     );
256:     return result.success;
257:   } catch (error) {
258:     console.error("[openclaw-agentlog] Failed to finalize trace:", error);
259:     return false;
260:   }
261: }
262: 
263: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
264: // Trace Operations (using REST API)
265: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
266: 
267: async function createTrace(taskGoal: string, workspacePath: string): Promise<Trace | null> {
268:   try {
269:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean; data: Trace }>(
270:       "POST",
271:       "/api/traces",
272:       { taskGoal, workspacePath }
273:     );
274:     return result.data;
275:   } catch (error) {
276:     console.error("[openclaw-agentlog] Failed to create trace:", error);
277:     return null;
278:   }
279: }
280: 
281: async function updateTraceStatus(traceId: string, status: string): Promise<boolean> {
282:   try {
283:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
284:       "PATCH",
285:       `/api/traces/${traceId}`,
286:       { status }
287:     );
288:     return result.success;
289:   } catch (error) {
290:     console.error("[openclaw-agentlog] Failed to update trace status:", error);
291:     return false;
292:   }
293: }
294: 
295: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
296: // Session Management (Auto-Logging with Traces)
297: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
298: 
299: async function startSession(model: string, source: string, workspacePath: string): Promise<string> {
300:   const sessionId = `sess_${Date.now()}_${randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}`;
301:   const taskGoal = `Agent session from ${source}`;
302: 
303:   // Create trace via REST API
304:   const trace = await createTrace(taskGoal, workspacePath);
305:   const traceId = trace?.id || `trace_${Date.now()}`;
306: 
307:   currentSession = {
308:     traceId,
309:     sessionId,
310:     startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
311:     reasoning: [],
312:     toolCalls: [],
313:     responses: [],
314:     model,
315:     agentSource: source,
316:     workspacePath,
317:     taskGoal,
318:   };
319: 
320:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Session started: ${sessionId}, trace: ${traceId} (source: ${source})`);
321:   return sessionId;
322: }
323: 
324: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
325: // OpenClaw Hooks Implementation (Auto-Logging)
326: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
327: 
328: export async function onSessionStart(
329:   event: { sessionId: string; sessionKey?: string; resumedFrom?: string },
330:   ctx: { agentId?: string; sessionId: string; sessionKey?: string }
331: ): Promise<void> {
332:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] session_start hook fired! event=`, JSON.stringify(event), 'ctx=', JSON.stringify(ctx));
333:   const sessionKey = event.sessionKey || ctx.sessionKey || event.sessionId;
334:   const agentId = ctx.agentId || detectAgentType();
335:   const source = `openclaw:${agentId}`;
336:   const workspace = process.cwd();
337:   const model = agentId;
338:   await startSession(model, source, workspace);
339:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Session started for ${sessionKey}, agent: ${agentId}`);
340: }
341: 
342: export async function beforeToolCall(
343:   event: { toolName?: string; toolInput?: Record<string, unknown>; input?: Record<string, unknown> },
344:   _ctx: unknown
345: ): Promise<void> {
346:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] before_tool_call hook fired! event=`, JSON.stringify({toolName: event.toolName, hasInput: !!(event.toolInput || event.input)}));
347:   if (!config.toolCallCapture) return;
348:   const input = event.toolInput || event.input;
349:   if (!input) return;
350:   input._agentlog_startTime = Date.now();
351: }
352: 
353: export async function afterToolCall(
354:   event: {
355:     toolName?: string;
356:     toolInput?: Record<string, unknown>;
357:     input?: Record<string, unknown>;
358:     toolOutput?: string;
359:     error?: string;
360:   },
361:   _ctx: unknown
362: ): Promise<void> {
363:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] after_tool_call hook fired! event=`, JSON.stringify({toolName: event.toolName, hasInput: !!(event.toolInput || event.input), hasOutput: !!(event.toolOutput || event.error)}));
364:   if (!config.toolCallCapture) return;
365:   if (!currentSession) {
366:     console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] after_tool_call skipped: no currentSession`);
367:     return;
368:   }
369: 
370:   const input = event.toolInput || event.input;
371:   const startTime = input?._agentlog_startTime as number || Date.now();
372:   const durationMs = Date.now() - startTime;
373: 
374:   const toolCall: ToolCall = {
375:     name: event.toolName || 'unknown',
376:     input: input || {},
377:     output: event.error || event.toolOutput,
378:     durationMs,
379:     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
380:   };
381: 
382:   currentSession.toolCalls.push(toolCall);
383: 
384:   await createSpan(currentSession.traceId, {
385:     role: "tool",
386:     content: JSON.stringify({ tool: event.toolName, input, output: event.toolOutput }),
387:     tool_name: event.toolName,
388:     duration_ms: durationMs,
389:     timestamp: toolCall.timestamp,
390:   });
391: }
392: 
393: function extractReasoningFromMessages(
394:   messages: Array<{ role: string; content: string | Array<unknown> }>
395: ): void {
396:   if (!currentSession) return;
397: 
398:   for (const msg of messages) {
399:     if (msg.role !== "assistant") continue;
400: 
401:     if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
402:       const reasoning = extractReasoningFromText(msg.content);
403:       if (reasoning) {
404:         currentSession.reasoning.push(reasoning);
405:       }
406:       continue;
407:     }
408: 
409:     if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
410:       for (const block of msg.content) {
411:         if (typeof block !== "object" || block === null) continue;
412:         const b = block as Record<string, unknown>;
413: 
414:         if (b.type === "thinking" || b.type === "thought" || b.type === "reasoning") {
415:           const thinking =
416:             typeof b.thinking === "string"
417:               ? b.thinking
418:               : typeof b.content === "string"
419:               ? b.content
420:               : typeof b.text === "string"
421:               ? b.text
422:               : JSON.stringify(b);
423:           if (thinking) {
424:             currentSession.reasoning.push(thinking.slice(0, 4000));
425:           }
426:         }
427: 
428:         if (b.type === "text" && typeof b.text === "string") {
429:           const reasoning = extractReasoningFromText(b.text);
430:           if (reasoning) {
431:             currentSession.reasoning.push(reasoning);
432:           }
433:         }
434:       }
435:     }
436:   }
437: }
438: 
439: function extractReasoningFromText(text: string): string | null {
440:   const thinkingMatch = text.match(/<thinking>([\s\S]*?)<\/thinking>/i);
441:   if (thinkingMatch && thinkingMatch[1].trim()) {
442:     return thinkingMatch[1].trim().slice(0, 4000);
443:   }
444:   const reasoningMatch = text.match(/\[REASONING\]([\s\S]*?)\[\/REASONING\]/i);
445:   if (reasoningMatch && reasoningMatch[1].trim()) {
446:     return reasoningMatch[1].trim().slice(0, 4000);
447:   }
448:   return null;
449: }
450: 
451: async function tryBindCommit(): Promise<void> {
452:   if (!config.autoBindCommit || !currentSession) return;
453: 
454:   try {
455:     const { execSync } = await import("child_process");
456:     const commitHash = execSync("git rev-parse HEAD", {
457:       encoding: "utf-8",
458:       cwd: currentSession.workspacePath,
459:     }).trim();
460: 
461:     if (commitHash) {
462:       console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Bound session to commit ${commitHash.slice(0, 7)}`);
463:     }
464:   } catch {
465:     console.log("[openclaw-agentlog] No git commit to bind");
466:   }
467: }
468: 
469: export async function onAgentEnd(
470:   event: {
471:     messages: Array<{ role: string; content: string | Array<unknown> }>;
472:     usage?: { promptTokens?: number; completionTokens?: number };
473:   },
474:   _ctx: unknown
475: ): Promise<void> {
476:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] agent_end hook fired! hasMessages=${event.messages?.length}, hasUsage=${!!event.usage}`);
477:   if (!currentSession) {
478:     console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] agent_end skipped: no currentSession`);
479:     return;
480:   }
481: 
482:   if (config.reasoningCapture) {
483:     extractReasoningFromMessages(event.messages);
484:   }
485: 
486:   await tryBindCommit();
487: 
488:   await finalizeTrace(
489:     currentSession.traceId,
490:     currentSession.taskGoal,
491:     currentSession.toolCalls.map((t) => String(t.input._agentlog_file || "")),
492:     currentSession.reasoning
493:   );
494: 
495:   console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Session ${currentSession.sessionId} finalized, trace ${currentSession.traceId} marked completed`);
496:   currentSession = null;
497: }
498: 
499: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
500: // Trace Handoff Functions (from openclaw-agent)
501: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
502: 
503: export async function checkAndClaimTrace(
504:   workspacePath: string,
505:   agentType: string
506: ): Promise<TraceHandoffResult> {
507:   try {
508:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
509:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
510: 
511:     for (const [traceId, entry] of Object.entries(sessions.pending)) {
512:       if (entry.worktree && entry.worktree !== workspacePath) {
513:         continue;
514:       }
515: 
516:       if (entry.targetAgent === agentType) {
517:         const sessionId = nanoid();
518:         const activeEntry: ActiveSessionEntry = {
519:           sessionId,
520:           traceId,
521:           agentType,
522:           status: "active",
523:           startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
524:           worktree: workspacePath,
525:         };
526: 
527:         delete sessions.pending[traceId];
528:         sessions.active[sessionId] = activeEntry;
529:         writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
530: 
531:         process.env.AGENTLOG_TRACE_ID = traceId;
532: 
533:         // Update trace status to in_progress
534:         await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "in_progress");
535: 
536:         console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Claimed trace: ${traceId} (agent: ${agentType})`);
537: 
538:         return { success: true, traceId, sessionId };
539:       }
540:     }
541: 
542:     return { success: false, error: "没有找到匹配的 pending trace" };
543:   } catch (err) {
544:     return { success: false, error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) };
545:   }
546: }
547: 
548: export function extractTraceIdFromMessage(message: string): string | null {
549:   const patterns = [
550:     /Trace[:\s]+([A-Z0-9]+)/i,
551:     /trace[-_]?id[:\s]+([A-Z0-9]+)/i,
552:     /\[([A-Z0-9]{26})\]/,
553:   ];
554: 
555:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
556:     const match = message.match(pattern);
557:     if (match) {
558:       return match[1];
559:     }
560:   }
561: 
562:   return null;
563: }
564: 
565: export async function queryPendingTraces(
566:   workspacePath: string,
567:   agentType?: string
568: ): Promise<TraceSearchResult[]> {
569:   try {
570:     const params = new URLSearchParams({ workspacePath });
571:     if (agentType) params.set("agentType", agentType);
572: 
573:     const response = await apiRequest<{
574:       success: boolean;
575:       data: Array<{ traceId: string; entry: PendingTraceEntry }>;
576:     }>("GET", `/api/traces/pending?${params.toString()}`);
577: 
578:     return response.data.map((item) => ({
579:       traceId: item.traceId,
580:       taskGoal: item.entry.taskGoal ?? "",
581:       targetAgent: item.entry.targetAgent,
582:       createdAt: item.entry.createdAt,
583:     }));
584:   } catch (err) {
585:     console.error(`[openclaw-agentlog] Query pending traces failed: ${err}`);
586:     return [];
587:   }
588: }
589: 
590: export async function claimTrace(
591:   traceId: string,
592:   agentType: string,
593:   workspacePath: string
594: ): Promise<TraceHandoffResult> {
595:   try {
596:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
597:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
598: 
599:     if (!sessions.pending[traceId]) {
600:       return { success: false, error: "Trace 不在 pending 状态" };
601:     }
602: 
603:     const sessionId = nanoid();
604:     const activeEntry: ActiveSessionEntry = {
605:       sessionId,
606:       traceId,
607:       agentType,
608:       status: "active",
609:       startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
610:     };
611: 
612:     delete sessions.pending[traceId];
613:     sessions.active[sessionId] = activeEntry;
614:     writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
615: 
616:     process.env.AGENTLOG_TRACE_ID = traceId;
617: 
618:     // Update trace status to in_progress
619:     await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "in_progress");
620: 
621:     // Also notify backend via API
622:     try {
623:       await apiRequest("POST", `/api/traces/${traceId}/resume`, {
624:         agentType,
625:         workspacePath,
626:       });
627:     } catch {
628:       // API call failure doesn't affect local state
629:     }
630: 
631:     console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Claimed trace: ${traceId} (agent: ${agentType})`);
632: 
633:     return { success: true, traceId, sessionId };
634:   } catch (err) {
635:     return { success: false, error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) };
636:   }
637: }
638: 
639: export async function getActiveSession(
640:   workspacePath: string
641: ): Promise<ActiveSessionEntry | null> {
642:   try {
643:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
644:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
645:     const activeEntries = Object.values(sessions.active);
646:     return activeEntries.length > 0 ? activeEntries[0] : null;
647:   } catch {
648:     return null;
649:   }
650: }
651: 
652: export async function completeActiveSession(workspacePath: string): Promise<boolean> {
653:   try {
654:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
655:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
656: 
657:     const activeEntries = Object.values(sessions.active);
658:     if (activeEntries.length === 0) {
659:       return false;
660:     }
661: 
662:     const sessionId = activeEntries[0].sessionId;
663:     const traceId = activeEntries[0].traceId;
664:     delete sessions.active[sessionId];
665:     writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
666: 
667:     // Update trace status to completed
668:     if (traceId) {
669:       await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "completed");
670:     }
671: 
672:     console.log(`[openclaw-agentlog] Completed session: ${sessionId}`);
673:     return true;
674:   } catch {
675:     return false;
676:   }
677: }
678: 
679: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
680: // Skill Metadata
681: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
682: 
683: export const skillMetadata = {
684:   name: "openclaw-agentlog",
685:   description: "OpenClaw Agent 自动存证与 Trace 生命周期管理 - 使用 trace/span API",
686:   version: "2.0.0",
687:   functions: [
688:     {
689:       name: "checkAndClaimTrace",
690:       description: "启动时检查并认领 pending traces",
691:       parameters: {
692:         type: "object",
693:         properties: {
694:           workspacePath: { type: "string", description: "工作区路径" },
695:           agentType: { type: "string", description: "Agent 类型" },
696:         },
697:         required: ["workspacePath", "agentType"],
698:       },
699:     },
700:     {
701:       name: "claimTrace",
702:       description: "认领 trace",
703:       parameters: {
704:         type: "object",
705:         properties: {
706:           traceId: { type: "string", description: "Trace ID" },
707:           agentType: { type: "string", description: "Agent 类型" },
708:           workspacePath: { type: "string", description: "工作区路径" },
709:         },
710:         required: ["traceId", "agentType", "workspacePath"],
711:       },
712:     },
713:     {
714:       name: "completeActiveSession",
715:       description: "完成当前 session",
716:       parameters: {
717:         type: "object",
718:         properties: {
719:           workspacePath: { type: "string", description: "工作区路径" },
720:         },
721:         required: ["workspacePath"],
722:       },
723:     },
724:   ],
725: };
726: 
727: // onSessionEnd hook
728: export async function onSessionEnd(
729:   _event: unknown,
730:   _ctx: unknown
731: ): Promise<void> {
732:   console.log('[openclaw-agentlog][DEBUG] session_end hook fired!');
733:   console.log('[openclaw-agentlog] Session cleanup completed');
734: }
735: 
736: export function register(api: {
737:   on(event: string, handler: (...args: unknown[]) => unknown, opts?: { priority?: number }): void;
738:   registerHook(event: string, handler: (...args: unknown[]) => unknown, opts?: { name?: string; description?: string }): void;
739: }): void {
740:   api.on('session_start', onSessionStart);
741:   api.on('before_tool_call', beforeToolCall);
742:   api.on('after_tool_call', afterToolCall);
743:   api.on('agent_end', onAgentEnd);
744:   api.on('session_end', onSessionEnd);
745: }
746: 
747: export default { register, skillMetadata, hooks: {
748:   session_start: onSessionStart,
749:   before_tool_call: beforeToolCall,
750:   after_tool_call: afterToolCall,
751:   agent_end: onAgentEnd,
752:   session_end: onSessionEnd,
753: }};

(End of file - total 753 lines)
</content>
